texto: Dubai24-7.com is an online and mobile platform that brings you the buzz on Dubai. At your fingertips, Dubai 24-7.com allows you to plan your travel itinerary, providing up-to-date listings on restaurants, shows, accommodation, attractions and leisure activities.
